title: ModelCatalog
description: Catalog of evaluable models. Carries provider routing (env-var NAMES only, never secret values) and pricing for cost computation and the Part 3 advisor.

id.description: Stable catalog key used in run records.

org.description: Owning organization, display name (e.g. Anthropic, 阿里, 字节跳动, DeepSeek). Drives the grouped catalog view.

openness.description: closed = proprietary/closed-weights API; open = open-weights model.

snapshot.description: Pinned model snapshot/version string passed to the API.

client.description: How to reach this model. References env-var NAMES only.

api_key_env.description: Name of the env var holding the API key, e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

base_url_env.description: Name of the env var holding the base URL (for openai_compat domestic providers).

base_url_default.description: Fallback base URL if the env var is unset.

model_param.description: The exact model string to send to the API (defaults to snapshot or id).

pricing.description: USD per 1M tokens. Used to compute cost_usd.
